hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -Eq 'git[[:space:]]+([^&|;]*[[:space:]])?(commit|push)([[:space:]]|$)'; then printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Project hook: Claude must never run git commit or git push. The user handles all git writes; make file changes only."}}'; fi

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); case "$f" in */prisma/migrations/*) printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"Project hook: this edits a file under prisma/migrations/. Never edit an already-applied migration (causes prod drift). Approve only for a fresh --create-only migration; otherwise add a NEW migration via yarn prisma:migrate dev."}}';; esac

printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Project hook: Claude must never transition a Jira issue or edit its fields. The user moves the board columns themselves after they push. Post a comment with addCommentToJiraIssue instead."}}'
